metadata.name: MOU - Notifications
metadata.description: Test notification rules for the MOU agreement.

rules.name: Agreement Deployed
rules.description: Notify participants and observers when the MOU is deployed.

notification.subject: MOU ready for review: ${agreementName}
notification.title: You've been invited to an MOU
notification.body: The MOU has been deployed and is ready for participant review.

rules.name: MOU Concluded
rules.description: Notify participants and observers when the MOU reaches a final state.

notification.subject: MOU concluded: ${agreementName}
notification.title: This MOU has reached a final state
